sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44527" key="eu)nath/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐν-ᾱτήρ</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐν-άτειρα</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐν-άτρια</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐν-άτωρ</orth>, <sense id="n44527.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐνητ</ref> </xr>-.</sense> </entryFree>
